transforms.train:
Compose(
    RandomHorizontalFlip(p=0.5)
    ImageClassification(
    crop_size=[224]
    resize_size=[256]
    mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406]
    std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225]
    interpolation=InterpolationMode.BILINEAR
)
)
transforms.val:
ImageClassification(
    crop_size=[224]
    resize_size=[256]
    mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406]
    std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225]
    interpolation=InterpolationMode.BILINEAR
)
